purpose: Unified canonical state for Research/ repository governance. Single source of truth for current surfaces, subsystem ownership, and agent edit scope.

principles.verification: doubt the verifier - all governance is inspectable and revisable
principles.derivation: INTEGRITY_MANIFEST derived from this + REGISTRY_MANIFEST at validation time
principles.federation: subsystem truth stays local; this file coordinates without absorbing
principles.minimization: recompress when navigation burden exceeds capability

root-governance.purpose: umbrella routing, package-role clarity, release hygiene

knowledge.purpose: atlas structure, study routes, typed relations

internal.purpose: stronger formulations, unresolved tensions, compressed AI notation
internal.note: Outside git repo; delta layer only. Path is informational; scope_prefixes point outside repo so validators treat this subsystem as an expected exception.

human-operator.authority: objectives, values, irreversible approvals, meaning-heavy calls

external-agent.authority: bounded operator recovering state from files not chat

internal-agent.authority: bounded operator with local context, no unilateral irreversible decisions

validator.authority: deterministic support role, not meaning authority

edit_scope_policy.local: single file edits using owning subsystem conventions
edit_scope_policy.cross_subsystem: requires explicit handoff packet with provenance, summary, target, status, change_class
edit_scope_policy.governance: changes to GOVERNANCE_CORE require version bump + validation pass
edit_scope_policy.prohibited: agents may not silently promote content to accepted status or overwrite human-authored notes

renewal_cycle.trigger: stale surfaces, rising navigation burden, validators pass but quality degrades
renewal_cycle.success_condition: repository simpler and clearer than before, not just restructured

local_file.description: single file, note, or module scope

subsystem.description: one bounded package or operating layer

cross_subsystem.description: coordination layer spanning more than one bounded part

root_governance.description: umbrella routing, policy, and release hygiene

private_internal.description: non-public operator and agent delta surfaces

durable_writeback_packet.note: Cross-subsystem handoff packets must include all required fields

governance_meta.guided_convergence_target: increase coherence, auditability, and self-coverage while resisting drift, stale legacy growth, and meta-inflation
governance_meta.compression_v0_2_note: Restored scope_classes, durable_writeback_packet, governance_meta from v0.1 to prevent conceptual loss

_derived.integrity_manifest: derived from current_surfaces + REGISTRY_MANIFEST.sha256 at validation time
